title: Timeline! The colours aren't the same as the group! HELP! (Please)

posts.author: eoin_ogrady (Eoin O'Grady)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Guys,

The timeline view. How do we changes the colours? In our business, Service, Repair, Installations, Office and time off have a colour in our shifts calendar. I would like to move to doing this on monday.com.
Now the issue that I am experiencing currently is that the colour of the item on the group, does not match the colour that shows up when I move to the timeline view. Now, these items do have connected board information, So I thought that might be the issue!

Any help would be greatly appreciated!

Kind regards,

The Irishman on Monday.com.

Eoin
